text:

author: Toei Animation
text:
Digimon Adventure: (2020) | Full Episode 64 - The Angels' Determination
▶ Digimon Adventure: (2020) Anime Series Playlist: https://tinyurl.com/4z2tbhxj

About Digimon Adventure: (2020)
It's the year 2020. The Network has become something humans can no longer do without in their daily lives. But what humans don't know is that on the other side of the Network is the Digital World, a realm of light and darkness. Nor are they aware of the Digimon who live there. The DigiDestined meet their partner Digimon, and they're faced with an adventure into the unknown...! ☑️ Subscribe to Toei Animation on Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@ToeiAnimationOfficial

👍 If you liked this video, make sure to hit a LIKE on this page.
